title: Hierarchy of Java's Built-in Exception Classes
description: A visual representation of the inheritance hierarchy and categories of Java's core exception classes, showing the relationship between Throwable, Exception, RuntimeException, and other common built-in exceptions.
relationships: Throwable is the superclass of all errors and exceptions
Exception extends Throwable and is the parent of most recoverable exceptions
RuntimeException extends Exception and represents unchecked exceptions
Error extends Throwable and represents serious unrecoverable system errors
Checked Exceptions are subclasses of Exception but not RuntimeException
Unchecked Exceptions include RuntimeException and its subclasses, and Error and its subclasses
